description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Add the most recent draw of the Macau 6/49 game with a jackpot over MOP 10,000,000 to your watched draws list.

tasks.instruction: Use the ticket checker to verify a Straight play Macau Daily 3 ticket with digits 5-7-2 for an evening draw in August 2024 and then open that draw’s prize breakdown.
